title: Fictional Japanese Animation Moon Journey Movie Poster AI
sourceTitle: Fictional Japanese Animation Moon Journey Movie Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic anime movie poster for fictional film Cinematic anime movie poster for a fictional film called "EL VIAJE DE LA LUNA DE PLATA" in polished modern Japanese animation style, natural and clean look., built in polished modern Japanese animation style. Subject: teen anime girl with short silver bob haircut, pale skin, black choker, geometric earrings, white tank top, and dark navy oversized hoodie with yellow sleeve stripes stands center from mid-thigh up with a softly censored face block, backpack strap, hands in hoodie pockets, and quiet travel-fantasy mood. Scene: twilight coastal city with train platform, commuter train, ferris wheel skyline, mountains, illuminated valley road, cliffside sunset coast, crescent moon, seabirds, and blends twilight travel nostalgia and fantasy: train platform, city skyline, ferris wheel, mountains, valley road, cliffside coast, sea, crescent moon, seabirds, and highway. Composition: Fixed vertical one-sheet poster with centered character, left filmstrip showing Cinematic anime movie poster for a fictional film called "EL VIAJE DE LA LUNA DE PLATA" in polished modern Japanese animation style, natural and clean look., right wooden signpost with NUEVOS CAMINOS / LA COSTA / LUNA DE PLATA, layered coastal-city background, and theatrical title hierarchy. Signature Elements: Preserved fictional japanese animation moon journey movie poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Film Title: EL VIAJE DE LA LUNA DE PLATA; Filmstrip Moments: performing on a train platform, looking over a coastal highway, standing near a moonlit signpost, and watching the commuter train arrive. Style: Polished modern Japanese animation key art, natural clean look, cinematic travel fantasy, nostalgic coastal city, theatrical poster finish, and high-detail environment storytelling. Color Palette: Fixed twilight navy, silver moonlight, warm sunset gold, muted beige censor block, city glow, train platform lights, and coastal blue-orange atmosphere. Lighting: Soft twilight rim light, warm sunset reflections on sea, city glow, train-platform highlights, and clean anime cinematic depth. Typography: Cinematic anime movie poster for a fictional film called "EL VIAJE DE LA LUNA DE PLATA" in polished modern Japanese animation style, natural and clean look. appears as the fictional movie title; NUEVOS CAMINOS / LA COSTA / LUNA DE PLATA appears on three readable wooden signs only. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
